raw.advertiser_name: パワプロアドベンチャーズ
raw.message: 有名競走馬・騎手が実名で登場する競馬メダルゲーム！今すぐダウンロード！

hook.summary: A smartphone displays horse racing gameplay with a challenge to win a high-payout ticket.
hook.visual_action: Smartphone screen showing horse race odds and a race in progress against a blurred racing background.

scene_flow: Smartphone screen displays horse racing odds and the start of a race.
Large text '万馬券!' (High-payout ticket) appears as horses cross the finish line.
A pile of gold coins grows rapidly with text promising medal increases.
Final CTA screen showing the app icon and download instructions.
on_screen_text: コナステ メダルコーナー
馬券的中でお得なメダル爆増
アーケードで人気の競馬ゲームがスマホで遊べる!
audience_proxy: Japanese adult males interested in horse racing betting and arcade-style medal games.
